title: justicia clarkeana
intro: Justicia clarkeana, also known as the Clarke's Justicia or Clarke's Forest Justicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Justicia clarkeana include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent. Herbal preparations of Justicia clarkeana can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine formulations.
